# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent {
        node {
            label 'master'
        }
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                echo 'Starting build on master node...'
                sh 'mvn clean install -DskipTests' // Replace with your build command
                echo 'Build complete.'
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                echo 'Starting tests on master node...'
                sh 'mvn test' // Replace with your test command
                echo 'Tests complete.'
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                echo 'Deploying to production from master node...'
                sh './deploy-script.sh --env=prod' // Replace with your deployment command
                echo 'Deployment complete.'
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            echo 'Pipeline finished.'
        }
        success {
            echo 'Pipeline executed successfully!'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Pipeline failed!'
        }
    }
}
